title: Razorpay UPI Payment Credential
description: Cryptographic proof of a completed Razorpay UPI payment. Generated by the Razorpay SDK after the buyer authorizes the payment in their UPI app. The business MUST verify razorpay_signature using HMAC-SHA256(razorpay_order_id + '|' + razorpay_payment_id, key_secret) before capturing.

razorpay_payment_id.description: Razorpay Payment ID returned by the SDK on payment authorization (e.g., pay_Abcdef1234). Used as the payment reference for capture.

razorpay_order_id.description: Razorpay Order ID this payment belongs to. MUST match the razorpay_order_id in response_config. This is the binding — it ties this payment proof to the specific checkout. The business MUST reject credentials where this does not match.

razorpay_signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature generated by Razorpay SDK: HMAC_SHA256(razorpay_order_id + '|' + razorpay_payment_id, key_secret). The business verifies this using their key_secret without any additional network call.
